flavourText: She speaks only in riddles and subtext. Read between her lines to defeat her!
This slippery aristocrat twists every fact to suit his viewpoint. Can you see through his spin?
An empty page that haunts every writer. Fill it with vivid description and she vanishes!
He dismantles weak arguments for breakfast. Persuade him with rhetoric and structure!
She can name every technique but never explains the effect. Show her how real analysis is done!
His texts are jumbled and fractured. Unpick his structural choices to restore order!
Nothing is black and white in her courtroom. Only balanced, evidenced evaluation will win the verdict!
This sneaky serpent slithers between your sentences, she joins them where she shouldn't. Punctuate her into submission!
A spectral echo of the playwright himself. Prove you understand his craft and he shall rest!
Dense, swirling and impenetrable. Navigate through archaic prose and contextual murk to find clarity!
He inspects every performance with a ruthless eye. Show him you understand the drama on and off the page!
Her meaning spills across lines and stanzas. Catch every thread before she runs on without you!
A poem you have never seen before. Stay calm, read closely and trust your skills!
A towering colossus of disorganised paragraphs. Only a clear argument can topple him!
She memorised the entire book but never analyses a single word. Teach her what evidence really means!
He lurks in a separate paragraph, disconnected from the text. Weave him into your analysis to defeat him!
